Load Data¶

In [11]:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

signals = pd.read_csv("user_signals.csv")
In [ ]:
ratings = pd.read_parquet("data/ratings-20240501-20240531.parquet")
notes = pd.read_parquet("data/notes-20240501-20240531.parquet")
political = pd.read_csv("data/database_replication.csv")
In [12]:
# Join notes (ratings events) with political on noteId
political = political.rename(columns={'note_id': 'noteId', 'tweet_id': 'tweetId'})
notes_political = notes.merge(political[['noteId', 'tweetId', 'party', 'topic']], on='noteId', how='left')

print("Joined shape:", notes_political.shape)
print("Party value counts:", notes_political['party'].value_counts())
print("Null party %:", notes_political['party'].isna().mean().round(3))

party_map = {'republican': -1, 'democrat': 1, 'unknown': np.nan}
notes_political['party_num'] = notes_political['party'].map(party_map)

Joined shape: (6385001, 15)
Party value counts: party
republican    1099443
democrat       834051
unknown        706433
Name: count, dtype: int64
Null party %: 0.587

corr = notes_political[['party_num', 'noteFinalFactor']].corr()

In [19]:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
notes_political.boxplot(column='noteFinalFactor', by='party', 
                        positions=[0, 1, 2])
plt.xlabel('Party')
plt.ylabel('Note Final Factor')
plt.title('Note Factor by Party')
plt.suptitle('')  
plt.show()

<Figure size 800x600 with 0 Axes>

Q2¶

In [34]:
rating_counts = notes_political.groupby('raterParticipantId').size()
In [70]:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure()
plt.hist(rating_counts, bins=30)
plt.xlabel("Number of Ratings Given")
plt.ylabel("Number of Raters")
# plt.yscale("log")
plt.title("Distribution of Ratings per Rater")
plt.show()

print("Total raters:", len(rating_counts))
print("Raters with only 1 rating:", (rating_counts == 1).sum())
print("% with only 1 rating:", ((rating_counts == 1).sum() / len(rating_counts) * 100))
print("Median ratings per rater:", rating_counts.median())

Total raters: 499818
Raters with only 1 rating: 149727
% with only 1 rating: 29.956304094690466
Median ratings per rater: 3.0

In [68]:
active_raters = rating_counts[rating_counts > 500].index
user_signals = signals[signals['userID'].isin(active_raters)]

user_signals['rating_count'] = user_signals['userID'].map(rating_counts)

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.scatter(user_signals['rating_count'], 
            user_signals['avg_party_rated_helpful'],
            alpha=0.1, s=5)
plt.xlabel('Number of Ratings')
plt.ylabel('Avg Party Rated Helpful (-1=Rep, 1=Dem)')
plt.title('Contribution Frequency vs Partisanship')
plt.axhline(0, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
plt.xscale('log')
plt.show()

In [79]:
import numpy as np

active_raters = rating_counts[rating_counts > 10].index
print(active_raters.shape)
user_signals = signals[signals['userID'].isin(active_raters)]
user_signals['rating_count'] = user_signals['userID'].map(rating_counts)
df = user_signals.copy()

df['num_rep_helpful'] = (
    df['percent_republican_helpful'] *
    df['rating_count']
)

df['num_dem_helpful'] = (
    (1 - df['percent_republican_helpful']) *
    df['rating_count']
)

df['log_odds'] = np.log(
    (df['num_dem_helpful'] + 0.5) /
    (df['num_rep_helpful'] + 0.5)
)

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.hexbin(df['rating_count'],
           df['log_odds'],
           gridsize=50,
           xscale='log')

plt.colorbar(label='Count')
plt.axhline(0, color='red', linestyle='--')

plt.xlabel('Number of Ratings')
plt.ylabel('Log Odds (Dem vs Rep Helpful)')
plt.title('Contribution Frequency vs Log-Odds Partisanship at count > 10')

plt.show()

(124971,)

import numpy as np

active_raters = rating_counts[rating_counts > 300].index
print(active_raters.shape)
user_signals = signals[signals['userID'].isin(active_raters)]
user_signals['rating_count'] = user_signals['userID'].map(rating_counts)
df = user_signals.copy()

df['num_rep_helpful'] = (
    df['percent_republican_helpful'] *
    df['rating_count']
)

df['num_dem_helpful'] = (
    (1 - df['percent_republican_helpful']) *
    df['rating_count']
)

df['log_odds'] = np.log(
    (df['num_dem_helpful'] + 0.5) /
    (df['num_rep_helpful'] + 0.5)
)

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.hexbin(df['rating_count'],
           df['log_odds'],
           gridsize=50,
           xscale='log')

plt.colorbar(label='Count')
plt.axhline(0, color='red', linestyle='--')

plt.xlabel('Number of Ratings')
plt.ylabel('Log Odds (Dem vs Rep Helpful)')
plt.title('Contribution Frequency vs Log-Odds Partisanship at count > 300')

plt.show()

import numpy as np

active_raters = rating_counts[rating_counts > 800].index
print(active_raters.shape)
user_signals = signals[signals['userID'].isin(active_raters)]
user_signals['rating_count'] = user_signals['userID'].map(rating_counts)
df = user_signals.copy()

df['num_rep_helpful'] = (
    df['percent_republican_helpful'] *
    df['rating_count']
)

df['num_dem_helpful'] = (
    (1 - df['percent_republican_helpful']) *
    df['rating_count']
)

df['log_odds'] = np.log(
    (df['num_dem_helpful'] + 0.5) /
    (df['num_rep_helpful'] + 0.5)
)

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.hexbin(df['rating_count'],
           df['log_odds'],
           gridsize=50,
           xscale='log')

plt.colorbar(label='Count')
plt.axhline(0, color='red', linestyle='--')

plt.xlabel('Number of Ratings')
plt.ylabel('Log Odds (Dem vs Rep Helpful)')
plt.title('Contribution Frequency vs Log-Odds Partisanship at count > 800')

plt.show()

In [118]:
df = user_signals.copy()

conditions = [
    (df['avg_party_rated_helpful'] > 0) & (df['avg_party_rated_not_helpful'] > 0),
    (df['avg_party_rated_helpful'] < 0) & (df['avg_party_rated_not_helpful'] > 0),
    (df['avg_party_rated_helpful'] < 0) & (df['avg_party_rated_not_helpful'] < 0),
    (df['avg_party_rated_helpful'] > 0) & (df['avg_party_rated_not_helpful'] < 0),
]

labels = ['Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4']

df['quadrant'] = np.select(conditions, labels, default='On Axis')
quad_counts = df['quadrant'].value_counts()
print(quad_counts)

quadrant
On Axis    65030
Q2         18427
Q4         17577
Q3         14519
Q1          9418
Name: count, dtype: int64

Q4¶

In [ ]:
# Setup
helpful_mask = notes_political['helpfulnessLevel'].isin(['HELPFUL', 'SOMEWHAT_HELPFUL'])

active_users = rating_counts[rating_counts > 10].index
print(active_users.shape)
user_signals = signals[signals['userID'].isin(active_users)].copy()
user_signals['rating_count'] = user_signals['userID'].map(rating_counts)

# Quadrants
user_signals['quadrant'] = 'On Axis'
user_signals.loc[(user_signals['avg_party_rated_helpful'] < 0) & (user_signals['avg_party_rated_not_helpful'] > 0), 'quadrant'] = 'Q2 (pro-Republican)'
user_signals.loc[(user_signals['avg_party_rated_helpful'] > 0) & (user_signals['avg_party_rated_not_helpful'] < 0), 'quadrant'] = 'Q4 (pro-Democrat)'

# Get userIDs for each quadrant
q2_users = user_signals[user_signals['quadrant'] == 'Q2 (pro-Republican)']['userID']
q4_users = user_signals[user_signals['quadrant'] == 'Q4 (pro-Democrat)']['userID']
q2_ratings = notes_political[notes_political['raterParticipantId'].isin(q2_users)]
q4_ratings = notes_political[notes_political['raterParticipantId'].isin(q4_users)]


q2_per_user = q2_ratings.groupby('raterParticipantId')['party'].value_counts().unstack(fill_value=0)
q4_per_user = q4_ratings.groupby('raterParticipantId')['party'].value_counts().unstack(fill_value=0)

print("Q2 (pro-Republican) average ratings per user by party:")
print(q2_per_user.mean())

print("\nQ4 (pro-Democrat) average ratings per user by party:")
print(q4_per_user.mean())

(124971,)

party
democrat      10.983014
republican    11.646063
unknown        7.449883

In [166]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 6))

axes[0].hist(user_signals['num_unique_topics_rated'].dropna(), bins=20, edgecolor='black')
axes[0].set_xlabel('Number of Unique Topics')
axes[0].set_ylabel('Number of Users')
axes[0].set_title('Unique Topics Rated per User')

axes[1].hist(user_signals[user_signals['topic_entropy_rated'] > 0]['topic_entropy_rated'].dropna(), bins=50, edgecolor='black')
axes[1].set_xlabel('Topic Entropy')
axes[1].set_ylabel('Number of Users')
axes[1].set_title('Topic Diversity (Entropy) per User (excluding single-topic)')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Q6¶

In [ ]:
